subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Through the blessing of the Most Great Name, mayest thou be detached from the world and be turned in contemplation unto the Lord of ancient days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی انشاء الله بمبارکی اسم اعظم از عالم فارغ باشی و بمالک قدم متوجه و ناظر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
